description_long: This is a visually striking rifle with a bold red and orange color scheme, accented by black tiger-stripe patterns and gold highlights. The rifle features a fixed wooden stock, a curved magazine, and a standard-length barrel with iron sights. The receiver and handguard are decorated with intricate, stylized graphics, giving the weapon a custom, high-visibility appearance. The trigger, magazine release, and safety lever are all clearly defined, and the overall build suggests a robust, classic design reminiscent of the AK-47 family. The surface appears hard and smooth, with a semi-glossy finish that reflects light subtly. This rifle would stand out in any urban environment due to its vivid coloration and detailed artwork.
description: A red and orange rifle with black tiger-stripe accents, gold highlights, and a fixed wooden stock, featuring a curved magazine and standard barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the fixed stock, curved magazine, and detailed graphic patterns.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, safety lever, and the continuation of the graphic design.
